config.title: Platform configuration
config.subtitle: Live edits — effective immediately for new orders and sessions.

confirm.title: Confirm configuration change
confirm.body: Review the change below. This takes effect immediately for new activity.
confirm.dangerous: This is a sensitive setting — double-check before saving.

commissions.title: Commission rates
commissions.subtitle: Basis points per category. Snapshotted at checkout — existing orders unaffected.
commissions.dangerousHint: Commission changes apply only to new orders.

platform.title: Platform settings
platform.subtitle: COD cap, AI quotas, escrow release windows, and reservation TTL.
platform.dangerousHint: COD cap changes affect new checkout eligibility only.

flags.title: Feature flags
flags.subtitle: Toggle launch features without a deploy.

categories.title: Category tree
categories.subtitle: Reorder categories, toggle prohibition, and move subtrees safely.
categories.name: Name
categories.moveChildrenPrompt: This category has children. Move the entire subtree?
categories.orphanWarning: Cannot move without children — enable move-with-children.

kyc.title: KYC review queue
kyc.subtitle: Pending vendor verifications — oldest submissions first.

queue.error: Could not load the KYC queue.

detail.error: Could not load this KYC application.
detail.docsUnavailable: Document preview is temporarily unavailable (storage bucket dependency).
detail.docsExpired: Signed preview links expire after 5 minutes — refresh to view again.
detail.confirmResubmit: Ask the vendor to resubmit documents?
detail.success: Decision recorded — vendor will be notified.

reasons.name_mismatch: Name does not match MoMo registration

moderation.title: Canonical product moderation
moderation.subtitle: Review likely duplicate canonical products and merge into one survivor.

queue.error: Could not load duplicate product pairs.
queue.confirmBody: Listings for the losing product will move to the survivor. The old slug will 301 redirect and aliases will be combined.
queue.idempotent: These products were already merged — no changes made.

flags.title: Flag queue
flags.subtitle: Listing, review, and prohibited-category reports — oldest first.

queue.empty: No open flags in the queue.
queue.error: Could not load the flag queue.
queue.success: Action recorded — parties will be notified where applicable.
queue.repeatOffender: {count, plural, one {# prior actioned flag} other {# prior actioned flags}}

dismiss.title: Dismiss flag
dismiss.body: Close this report without taking content action.

unpublish.title: Unpublish listing
unpublish.body: Hide this listing from public search and catalog (≤1 min).
unpublish.warning: The listing will no longer appear publicly.

remove.title: Remove content
remove.body: Permanently remove the flagged listing or review.
remove.warning: This cannot be undone by the vendor.

warn-vendor.title: Warn vendor
warn-vendor.body: Send a policy warning to the vendor via WhatsApp.

escalate-suspend.title: Suspend vendor
escalate-suspend.body: Suspend the vendor account. Listings stop surfacing; in-flight orders and payouts are unaffected.
escalate-suspend.warning: Existing orders will continue — no cascade cancellation.
